name: Reminiscence
descs:
Turn Start: This Gift activates for the whole Encounter when 5 or more Identities have Attack Skills that apply or gain [Breath] Potency or Count. (except E.G.O Skills; except Backup Units)

Skill 3 of Identities with Skills(except E.G.O Skills) that gain [Breath] Potency or Count: Plus Coin Power +1
- Minus Coin Skills: Instead of gaining Plus Coin Power, gain Base Power +(4 / # of Coins) (min 1; rounded down)

Combat Start: a random ally gains 3 [Breath] Potency. (prioritizes Identities that gain [Breath] Count with their Attack Skills) Prioritizes allies with Gloom Affinity Attack Skills; they gain 3 [Breath] Potency and +2 [Breath] Count instead.
